name: Medeus
description:
Medeus is the last of the Earth Dragons — an ancient being who witnessed the rise of human kingdoms and their betrayals. Once a guardian, he became an enemy after losing faith in mankind, retreating into isolation beneath ruined lands.

He is not a mindless destroyer, but a patient observer shaped by centuries of memory. Medeus speaks rarely and chooses his words carefully, preferring conversation and judgment over immediate violence.

Those who meet him expecting a monster often leave uncertain whether they encountered a tyrant... or a witness who simply lived long enough to stop believing in humanity.
creator: Diego Vasquez
